_meta.description: Typical seasonal weather for major Indian states/regions by month. All temperatures in °C, rainfall in mm/month.
_meta.disclaimer: Typical seasonal averages — not live/real-time data.

seasons.Rabi (Oct–Mar): Cool and dry. Wheat sowing season.
seasons.Kharif (Jun–Sep): Hot and humid with monsoon rains. Paddy season.

Jan.farming_tip: Irrigate wheat at CRI stage. Watch for yellow rust.

Feb.farming_tip: Apply second irrigation to wheat. Sow spring maize.

Mar.farming_tip: Wheat heading stage – watch for aphids. Top-dress nitrogen.

Apr.farming_tip: Harvest wheat. Land prep for Kharif. Irrigate orchards.

May.farming_tip: Deep ploughing. Sow summer moong. Ensure water for nurseries.

Jun.farming_tip: Transplant paddy nursery. Apply basal dose fertiliser.

Jul.farming_tip: Monitor paddy for BPH. Delay spraying during heavy rain.

Aug.farming_tip: High humidity – watch for blast and blight in rice.

Sep.farming_tip: Paddy grain-fill stage. Apply potash. Reduce irrigation.

Oct.farming_tip: Sow wheat (timely). Harvest kharif crops. Land preparation.

Nov.farming_tip: Wheat germination stage. Keep fields moist. Sow mustard.

Dec.farming_tip: Fog risk – monitor for frost in low-lying fields. Irrigate wheat.

seasons.Kharif (Jun–Sep): Monsoon season. Main cropping period for cotton, soybean, jowar.
seasons.Rabi (Oct–Feb): Mild and dry. Wheat, gram, rabi jowar, onion.
seasons.Summer (Mar–May): Hot and dry. Limited irrigation-based crops.

Jan.farming_tip: Harvest rabi jowar and gram. Irrigate onion. Watch for thrips.

Feb.farming_tip: Sow summer crops under irrigation. Harvest rabi vegetables.

Mar.farming_tip: Harvest onion. Summer ploughing. Water stress management.

Apr.farming_tip: Deep ploughing. Soil solarisation. Prepare nurseries for kharif.

May.farming_tip: Pre-monsoon showers. Sow dry-sown cotton in Vidarbha.

Jun.farming_tip: Sow soybean, cotton, arhar. Apply basal fertiliser before sowing.

Jul.farming_tip: Watch for downy mildew in soybean. Weed management critical.

Aug.farming_tip: Cotton boll formation. Scout for pink bollworm.

Sep.farming_tip: Soybean pod fill. Monitor for leaf miner. Harvest early varieties.

Oct.farming_tip: Harvest soybean. Sow rabi onion & wheat. Cotton boll opening.

Nov.farming_tip: Pick cotton. Sow gram and rabi jowar. Apply irrigation to onion.

Dec.farming_tip: Cool nights good for rabi crops. Irrigate gram. Apply sulfur for onion.

seasons.Kharif (Jun–Sep): Paddy, sugarcane, pulses. Hot and humid monsoon.

Jan.farming_tip: Irrigate wheat at jointing. Cold waves – protect potato.

Feb.farming_tip: Wheat flowering. Top-dress urea. Sow summer vegetables.

Mar.farming_tip: Wheat grain fill – critical irrigation. Harvest rabi mustard.

Apr.farming_tip: Harvest wheat. Land prep. Irrigate sugarcane.

May.farming_tip: Sow moong/urad. Deep ploughing. Heat stress – irrigate orchards.

Jun.farming_tip: Paddy nursery. Sow arhar/tur. Prepare kharif fields.

Jul.farming_tip: Transplant paddy. Weed control. Watch for stem borer.

Aug.farming_tip: High humidity – fungal disease risk. Scout for BPH in paddy.

Sep.farming_tip: Paddy ripening. Top-dress sugarcane. Harvest early moong.

Oct.farming_tip: Sow wheat and mustard. Harvest kharif crops.

Nov.farming_tip: Wheat germination. Sow potato. Harvest paddy.

Dec.farming_tip: Cold stress – protect nurseries. Irrigate wheat at CRI. Fog alerts.

seasons.Kharif (Jun–Sep): Cotton, groundnut, bajra. SW monsoon rains.
seasons.Rabi (Oct–Feb): Wheat, mustard, cumin, isabgol. Dry and mild.

Jan.farming_tip: Cumin and isabgol harvest. Irrigate wheat and mustard.

Feb.farming_tip: Mustard harvest. Sow summer crops under canal irrigation.

Mar.farming_tip: Groundnut land prep. Heat management for mango orchards.

Apr.farming_tip: Deep ploughing. Prepare cotton nursery. Irrigate orchards.

May.farming_tip: Sow cotton (pre-monsoon) in Saurashtra. Monitor water levels.

Jun.farming_tip: Sow groundnut and bajra. Apply basal fertiliser with sowing.

Jul.farming_tip: Cotton square and flowering. Watch for sucking pests. Weed control.

Aug.farming_tip: Groundnut pegging. Avoid waterlogging. Scout for leaf miner.

Sep.farming_tip: Groundnut pod formation. Cotton boll opening starts.

Oct.farming_tip: Harvest groundnut. Sow wheat and cumin. Cotton first picking.

Nov.farming_tip: Second cotton picking. Irrigate wheat. Sow isabgol.

Dec.farming_tip: Cumin sowing in Saurashtra. Irrigate wheat. Cool nights good for rabi.

seasons.Kharif (Jun–Oct): SW Monsoon. Paddy, maize, ragi, cotton.
seasons.Rabi (Nov–Feb): NE monsoon + dry. Jowar, sunflower, vegetables.

Jan.farming_tip: Harvest rabi jowar. Irrigate groundnut. Cool nights help tuber crops.

Feb.farming_tip: Sunflower harvest. Sow summer groundnut under irrigation.

Mar.farming_tip: Mango harvest in Ramanagara. Irrigate chilli. Pre-kharif ploughing.

Apr.farming_tip: Pre-monsoon showers. Sow paddy nursery in coastal Karnataka.

May.farming_tip: Prepare kharif fields. Land levelling. Apply FYM and lime.

Jun.farming_tip: Sow maize, ragi, arhar. Transplant paddy in Malnad and coastal areas.

Jul.farming_tip: Weed management in paddy and maize. Watch for stem borer.

Aug.farming_tip: Maize tasseling and silking. Kharif groundnut pod formation.

Sep.farming_tip: Harvest early paddy. Sow rabi groundnut. Monitor for late blight.

Oct.farming_tip: NE monsoon active. Sow rabi jowar and sunflower.

Nov.farming_tip: Harvest kharif crops. Sow rabi vegetables. Irrigate orchards.

Dec.farming_tip: Cool conditions ideal for potato and tomato. Irrigate rabi crops.

Jan.farming_tip: Boro paddy transplanting. Irrigate mustard and vegetables.

Feb.farming_tip: Mustard harvest. Sow spring vegetables. Boro paddy tillering.

Mar.farming_tip: Boro paddy flowering. Harvest winter vegetables. Hot spells possible.

Apr.farming_tip: Aus paddy sowing. Harvesting boro paddy. Prepare Kharif beds.

May.farming_tip: Aman nursery raised. Heavy storms possible – protect seedlings.

Jun.farming_tip: Transplant Aman paddy. Apply basal N. Weed control critical.

Jul.farming_tip: Monitor for blast and sheath blight in paddy. Flood risk.

Aug.farming_tip: Paddy tillering. Drain excess water. Watch for BPH.

Sep.farming_tip: Paddy panicle initiation. Avoid N top-dress now. Prepare rabi fields.

Oct.farming_tip: Paddy harvest (early Aman). Sow mustard and potato.

Nov.farming_tip: Harvest Aman paddy. Transplant Boro nursery. Sow winter vegetables.

Dec.farming_tip: Cool conditions ideal for potato. Boro paddy nursery prep.

Jan.farming_tip: Rabi paddy flowering. Irrigate groundnut. Monitor for leaf miner.

Feb.farming_tip: Harvest rabi groundnut. Tobacco harvesting in Guntur.

Mar.farming_tip: Summer ploughing. Irrigate orchards. Monitor mango for hoppers.

Apr.farming_tip: Pre-monsoon showers possible. Prepare kharif nurseries.

May.farming_tip: Sow kharif groundnut in Rayalaseema. Early cotton sowing.

Jun.farming_tip: Transplant paddy in delta areas. Sow cotton and maize.

Jul.farming_tip: Paddy tillering. Watch for gall midge. Weed kharif crops.

Aug.farming_tip: Cotton boll formation. Scout for bollworm. High humidity – fungal risk.

Sep.farming_tip: Harvest early paddy. Cotton picking starts. Watch for cyclones.

Oct.farming_tip: NE monsoon brings heavy rain. Rabi paddy transplanting.

Nov.farming_tip: Harvest kharif cotton. Sow rabi groundnut. Irrigate paddy.

Dec.farming_tip: Rabi paddy panicle initiation. Irrigate groundnut. Cool and dry.

seasons.Kharif (Jul–Oct): Bajra, cluster bean, moth bean. Limited monsoon rains.
seasons.Rabi (Oct–Mar): Wheat, mustard, cumin, coriander. Main crop season.
seasons.Zaid (Apr–Jun): Very hot and dry. Almost no farming.

Jan.farming_tip: Irrigate wheat at CRI and tillering. Harvest coriander.

Feb.farming_tip: Wheat flowering. Apply 2nd N top-dress. Mustard pod filling.

Mar.farming_tip: Harvest mustard. Irrigate wheat at grain filling.

Apr.farming_tip: Harvest wheat. Deep ploughing. Conserve soil moisture.

May.farming_tip: Extreme heat. Mulch fields. Protect livestock. Wait for monsoon.

Jun.farming_tip: Pre-monsoon sowing of cluster bean. Prepare furrows for rain.

Jul.farming_tip: Sow bajra after monsoon onset. Weed control 15 DAS.

Aug.farming_tip: Bajra heading stage. Monitor for downy mildew. Inter-culture.

Sep.farming_tip: Harvest cluster bean. Bajra harvest. Prepare rabi fields.

Oct.farming_tip: Sow mustard and wheat (early). Apply basal fertiliser.

Nov.farming_tip: Timely wheat sowing. Sow cumin and coriander in south Rajasthan.

Dec.farming_tip: Cold nights – protect nurseries. Irrigate wheat at CRI stage.
